form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign won by 1.3 len Hamilton Park September 29 over 1000m slow track defeating Al Hussar with 61kg at $4. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.5 len Haydock Park September 5 over 1000m defeating Speeding Bullet with 62.5kg at $4. Key runner.

formComments.title: TAB

Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.5 len Haydock Park September 5 over 1000m defeating Speeding Bullet with 62.5kg at $4. Key runner.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation eighth of 22 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, on heavy track; 5.5 len behind Golden Mind carrying 57.5kg at $26. Previously first up; fourth of 9 at this track April 16 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Northern Spirit with 59kg at $8. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 5th of 14 at Newcastle All Weather on February 6 over 1000m, 4 len behind Fahrenheit Seven carrying 58.5kg at $12. When resuming last campaign second last of 7 at Southwell All Weather on November 21 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Sturlasson carrying 56kg at $8. Has the talent to take this out.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 16th of 18 at York October 10 over 1000m, 8 len behind Dan Tucker with 59kg at $10. When resuming last campaign third of 9 at Thirsk May 17 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Kodiac Thriller carrying 61.5kg at $13. Might need a run or two.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 14th of 22 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, in the wet; 10 len behind Golden Mind carrying 55.5kg at $26. First up last campaign second of 9 at this track April 16 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Northern Spirit with 59.5kg at $5.50. Will need this hitout.

form.formComment: At the latest run 11th of 14 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1200m, 12 len behind Power Fizz with 59.5kg at $15. Before that 7th of 10 at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 1000m, 6 len behind Gaeli carrying 58kg at $5.50. Rates highly and is worth another chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Pixie Diva with 60.5kg at $5.50. The start before that won by 1.3 len at Southwell All Weather March 14 over 1000m defeating Sam's Hope with 58.5kg at $3.30. Terrific chance to return to form.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 9th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Pixie Diva with 58kg at $15. Previously second-up 5th of 13 at this track on May 5 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Hover On The Wind with 61kg at $51. Rates highly and can do much better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run for some distance approaching the one furlong marker.
Denied a clear run approximately a furlong out.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Catterick October 18 over 1000m, 8 len behind Lexington Blitz with 52.5kg at $15. Previously first up; third of 8 at Catterick April 23 over 1000m, 2 len behind Military Girl carrying 60kg at $9.50. Will improve on what he manages this time.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation 13th of 16 at Doncaster September 14 over 1000m, soft track; 8 len behind Lethal Nymph carrying 62kg at $13. Previously first up; second of 8 at Doncaster April 25 over 1000m, a nose behind Dothan carrying 59kg at $8.50. Hard to have.
